34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: To build in 2019.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And the city's trying to get that,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: and the city's made it different now.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: We have much more barriers to build than they,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: they've taken out a lot of the barriers to building the city.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Unfortunately for us, there's so much you got to get lined up just to get started,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: the permitting and all that stuff.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And for us, we're a, we're a developer, but we have investors.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So lining up all the investors and getting the money all lined up

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: and then getting it going through the city,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: getting all the site plan approvals and all that stuff.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And then you start building.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And then the fun really starts.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: When we built this, it was a lot better than it is now to build all these,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: because when we were building this one, there was still plenty of trades.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And like they could flood the place to finish it off.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Now the trades are so thin.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Like you're supposed to have like 16 to 20 electricians,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: you end up with six or eight.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And then half of them call off every day.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So it's a challenge, a challenge to build anything.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: It's actually amazing that ever it comes to, you know,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: watch it being built.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: It's amazing that you ever actually finish.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Like just to watch all the obstacles you got to go through

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: and the headaches and heartaches.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: But it is fun. I enjoyed it.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: It's so special.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Actually, I think I've seen some of this.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And did you buy the land for that one at the same time as you bought this?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: We were acquiring all the properties here at the same time.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And that was a process because it wasn't one owner.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So it wasn't one transaction. It was multiple.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: I remember that it was like small little shops.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Yeah. Yeah.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: That was, you know, we had the PNC Bank on the corner.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Had Oasis, the restaurant there.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Then we had the apothecary, then a village apothecary.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And that guy actually went out of business.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: The old apothecary, he just walked away one day.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Bankrupt and walked away.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: That was the center of the building.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: That was like the final part for that.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Wow.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: This one was a little bit easier because it was basically all Ulrich's.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: All right.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So it was all the Ulrich's family trust and marital trust and all that stuff.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So this one was more about convincing them, her really.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Manager
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: My boss, Ron, is the one that did all this.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: It's like looking back on it, it sounds like it should have been easy to convince her.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Like you don't need a 25,000 square foot bookstore.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Now they don't even have a bookstore.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: There is no bookstores anymore.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So to convince her, like what you have is kind of outdated.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: We'd like to put something like a high-rise here for students.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: She was hesitant at first, but obviously she did the right thing.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Because that bookstore would be sitting there empty with nothing in it.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Because really there's nothing else she could have done with that whole block.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Did most of those people actually own the land?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Or were they renting the land?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: A lot of them.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So Ulrich still owned the land basically.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So there's multiple things on all these properties around here.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: A lot of it are land leases.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So it's the perfect scenario.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: You own the land and you lease it to me.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: I pay you to build on it.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And you don't have to worry about a thing.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: It's the perfect scenario.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So if your family can get to that point, you're set.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: All you do is cash the checks.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: You have no worries.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: You don't have to pay all the taxes.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: You pay taxes on your income is all you pay taxes on.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Wow.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So there's a lot of different.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And Ann Arbor is a lot like that.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: A lot of these families never sell.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: They keep the land and they put it in family trusts.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So it's generational.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So their kids have it.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So there's a lot of that around here.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: That's cool.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Yeah.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And this property, is there anything that you did in that property that you didn't do in this property?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So that one being the sister property, we focused on that one to be flexible.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Where this one is basically four, five, and six beds.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: That one's essentially two, three, and four beds.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So that's got more units in it.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: More bedrooms, but there's more units because they're smaller units.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Because we got the big groups for here.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: The five and six beds for here.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Those are basically three and four beds.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: I see.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And that footprint was a little bit bigger.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So the bedrooms got to be a little bit bigger.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Because you're basically stuck with your footprint, right?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So you got from East Hall to South U.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: You have a hallway down the middle that has to be X, Y.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So now you're dealing with this much space.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So when you open that door, there's the hallway that has to be a certain amount.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So the bedroom is basically from that point forward.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So the bedrooms kind of create themselves.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So South is a deeper footprint.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So the bedrooms were able to be bigger, which they're the biggest in town.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Do they have policing teams there too?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: What?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Like some people?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Oh, yeah.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: The second floor, same thing.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: We got a model over there.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: It's a really nice model.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: You should check that out.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: I know Raising Cane started off in student campus.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So that one makes sense to me.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: But can you explain the story behind Joe's Pizza?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: How you convinced Joe's Pizza to come here?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: They convinced us to be here.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: What?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: The guys that own it are U of M grads.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So when they saw that this was being built,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: they saw an opportunity of bringing Joe's Pizza to Ann Arbor.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: No way.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And to be right on the day.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Wow.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: They're like, this is the perfect.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And it turned out to be true.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Especially when they opened them.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: The line used to be through the arch.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: That's insane.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: I've never seen that.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: There'd be 150 people in line.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: I'm like, dang, man.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: I remember the first football game.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: I'm like, I'm going to get a slice of pizza.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: We had Ian and Pete, our Michigan grads and businessmen.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: They saw an opportunity.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Really?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And we liked it.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: It's worked out.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Been a very good relationship.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Raising Cane's the same thing.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: They saw the opportunity to be on that corner.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Like, this is sweet.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: The difference with Raising Cane's is like,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: that dude's already there.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Like, he's got so much money.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: They were a month away from opening.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And their executive team looked at it and said,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: not enough seating.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Tear it all out.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Start all over again.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Really?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: They were done.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And they tore it all out.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: The whole thing.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Start all over again.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: It was insane.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Well, I'll tell you,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: I was there in Raising Cane's several weeks ago.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: There used to be a huge vibe around Joe's Pizza.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: But now there's a huge vibe around Raising Cane's.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: I don't know what is going on in that little corner.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Yeah, Joe's is kind of funny.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: It's still busy, but not like Joe's.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Raising Cane's is a different entity.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Because that's a corporate.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: I know Pete and Ian.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: I know Ashley and Andrew from Bo's Bagels.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: I know Perry from Brown Jug.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: I know Lisa from that.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: I know all the owners.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Raising Cane's, there's people that work there.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: I don't know the owners.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And I can't just call the owner and be like,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: what are you doing?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: What's going on with this or that?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: But it's a love-hate.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Raising Cane's brings more people down here,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: but takes away from the business.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So they like having more people coming down there,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: but they look at it as a direct competitor.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: That's cool.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And the big thing is,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: these properties don't have any problem with customers, right?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: That's not your real problem?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: With customers?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Yeah, right?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Prospect
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Or does competition make a difference to you guys?

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Because these new properties are coming.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Well, there's always competition in the student housing market.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: But no one can beat our competitors.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: It's so different.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: What we're seeing is these new developers coming online,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: the cost to build is so high right now.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: It costs us twice as much to build south as it did to build north.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: In five years, from 2019 to 2024, it dons and tops.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: It's a little bit bigger, but not that much.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: It's not twice as big.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So they're bigger, like their developers,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: you know, the Landmark Net that got placed all over the country.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: But you still have to at least try to turn a profit.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So when you have your building costs,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: then your carrying costs,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: and then your taxes and everything else,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: after you open,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: your rents have to kind of set themselves.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Like, we need to have this much income in order to offset our costs.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So when you break that down,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: a lot of times they just be like,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: this is what the rent's going to be,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: and it might be way too high.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So then you're like, well, if we lower the rent,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: then we're not going to make our mark.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So there's a lot of...

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: But that's their problem to deal with now.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Because those are the ones that are super expensive to build now,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: they're building now.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Right.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Because you built a little bit earlier,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: so you don't feel that's expensive.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: It's a little bit easier.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: And if you notice, the ones that are building now,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: they're super into the frills.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Like it's all, you have to have a pool,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: you got to have these fancy lobbies and all this stuff.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: None of us, like when we built here,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: like 611 Harbor Blues,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: we built all these.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: It wasn't frills.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: It was the spaces where you live.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: Like there's study spaces, fitness centers,

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: and then your apartment.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.text: So we focused on that part of it.

34a29aea-1810-4ec9-97b8-af3bd95fd8c8.speaker: Agent
